mapper.insert: insert into orders(number, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, pay_status, amount, remark, phone,consignee, estimated_delivery_time,delivery_status,tableware_number, tableware_status, pack_amount) values(#{number}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone},#{consignee}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime},#{deliveryStatus},#{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus}, #{packAmount})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}
where id = #{id}
